title: Berrfect
body:
![Berrfect](http://scpsandboxcn.wikidot.com/local--files/echoaphaniptera/bf_4_2.png)

Berrfect is a simple addon mod designed to improves more berries from various mods in a [Berry Good](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berry-good) style.

![Showcase](http://scpsandboxcn.wikidot.com/local--files/echoaphaniptera/bf_showcase.png)
